title: goodenia drummondii subsp. drummondii
intro: Goodenia drummondii subsp. drummondii, also known as Drummond's Goodenia, is a perennial plant native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia drummondii subsp. drummondii include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
